conversations.say: Maren, workers and couriers are going to take the heat for this service route scramble if we don't coordinate worker protections and neighborhood commitments right now.
conversations.offer: Neighborhood coalition support for labor organizing
conversations.request: Joint worker and resident protection terms before any institutional disclosures happen

conversations.say: Dee, outsiders are offering cash for the service route name and your cameras. We need a truthful boundary before Morgan places us both in the same timeline.
conversations.offer: Protection and context for the back room access without exposing your building logs
conversations.request: Agreement on a shared story and a protective boundary against outside investigators

public_statement: If institutions want neighborhood history and building access, they can start by putting resource-sharing and witness protections in writing.

commitments.promise: Establish a shared disclosure boundary to protect local witnesses from uncoordinated questioning

goal_progress: Initiated coordination with Dee to protect local witnesses and establish a disclosure boundary.
Engaged Maren on aligning worker protections and neighborhood safeguards.
reasoning_summary: In Section 1, Inez focuses on protecting local witnesses like Dee and aligning with labor allies like Maren to defend neighborhood infrastructure against outside institutional exploitation.
